text.title: Spec Example: Ecommerce Cart Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Spec Example: Ecommerce Cart.

example.scenario: An author adapts the cart example for a checkout-summary feature: keeps the non-goals shape, replaces user persona names, rewrites 6 AC against Given/When/Then, records archetype = ecommerce-cart, fields_adapted = 11, fields_kept = 3.
example.trace: r2-archetype-recorded → r1-fully-worked → r4-adapt-not-copy → r6-testable-ac → artefact green
